text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm at a winning concert rehearsal with Smart
Falcon.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Hmhm. ♪ Hmmm! ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Wink! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My spirits always soar when I see Smart Falcon on
stage.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Hehe! ☆ Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Honestly, Trainer, the look on your face...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
It's only a rehearsal. If you keep this up, I'm going
to worry about you when it comes time for the
real thing! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: But I do know how you feel. After all...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
It's my eternal goal to stand onstage wearing such
a wonderful costume. ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I've packed all of my feelings into this outfit. Even
the diamond pattern has a meaning.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Do you know why I chose diamonds, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: That's right! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
And what's more, diamonds come from mines,
right?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
When it's first mined from the earth, a diamond
just looks like a rock, but it shines brilliantly once
it's been polished by a jeweler.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
That's why I want you and all my fans to polish me
until I shine too!
choice_data_list:
Let's make sure you sparkle and charm
everyone!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! Ehehe... Now I'm itching to get to work
right away! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Seeing as I've already got my signature racewear
on, why don't we go out and put on a street
performance? ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for coming to my surprise
performance, everyone!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: You're so cute, Falco!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: That outfit looks so good on you!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Thank you! ☆ With all of your support, I'm gonna
shine even more!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
And I want to say thanks to my trainer too, for
finding me when I was still just a diamond in the
rough! ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna do my very best to shine even brighter,
so please keep supporting me! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Amidst the warm applause, Smart Falcon and I
reaffirm our determination.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Okay!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Talking about this kind of thing makes me want to
take off running. ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... Huff... ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Whew... That feels good! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
When I was a kid, the sight of idols on stage and
racers on the track was so thrilling, it made my
heart skip a beat.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I want to be able to sparkle like that, so I can
charm people just like they charmed me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell her how captivated I was when I saw her
running earlier.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Thank you, Trainer! Let's keep working hard
together...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
So I can shine with all my heart and soul in my
races and concerts! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
And someday, I'll become an Umadol more
charming than any jewel! ☆
